seo.title: What's got you beet! - a differently lovely beetroot - Marinda Kook

html:
On the Kokkedoor programme I learnt from Tiaan how to make beetroot. It's a whole different taste. The flavour of the beetroot is intense and delicious. It's baked on a bed of coarse salt.

Set your oven to 190 degrees Celsius. Baking time about 1 hour.

 

 

 

 

  1. Wash the beetroot nicely.
  2. Into a baking dish, pour a bed of coarse salt.
  3. Place your unpeeled beetroot on the salt and put it in the oven for about 1 hour. If you press in a sharp little knife it should just barely go in.
  4. Peel the beetroot while it's still warm.
  5. Now you can decide whether you want sweet/sour beetroot: Half a cup vinegar + quarter cup olive oil + salt + pepper
  6. I just poured olive oil, balsamic vinegar, salt, pepper and parsley over my beetroot.
